info.title: Frontguard Cloud API
info.description: OpenAPI contract for the agent and CI-facing Frontguard Cloud API surface. This document is derived from packages/cloud-api/src/index.ts and the mounted route modules under packages/cloud-api/src/routes, and intentionally excludes browser session, OAuth, Stripe billing, and API-key bootstrap routes.

get.description: Public health check. This route is not behind API-key authentication.

202.description: Run accepted and queued for asynchronous processing.

200.description: Recent runs visible to the caller.

get.summary: Get run status and result metadata
Fetch an HTML report for a completed run

202.description: Run exists but is not completed yet.

get.summary: Get monthly usage for the authenticated API key

200.description: Current month usage counters and static default limits.

get.summary: List screenshot metadata for a run

200.description: Screenshot metadata for an owned run.

Cache-Control.description: Private browser cache lifetime for image bytes.

200.description: Recent run history for the monitor.

post.summary: Send a sample alert for a monitor

200.description: Snooze state updated. A null value means snooze was cleared.

get.summary: Render the API-key guarded dashboard HTML
get.description: Read-only HTML dashboard mounted at /v1/dashboard. This is distinct from the session-cookie browser dashboard, which is intentionally excluded from this contract.

201.description: Team created; the caller is owner.

200.description: Invitation accepted or existing higher role preserved.
Team, members, projects, and caller role.

201.description: Invitation created. The token is returned by the real route for acceptance workflows.

200.description: Removal result. A missing target member returns removed false.

patch.summary: Set a member's baseline reviewer flag

get.summary: Get a project's approved baseline run
List review decisions for a project run

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Usage month in YYYY-MM format. Defaults to the current month.

bearerAuth.description: Send API keys as Authorization: Bearer fg_xxx. The fg_xxx value is a placeholder example.

XRateLimitLimit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the current rate-limit window.

XRateLimitRemaining.description: Requests remaining in the current rate-limit window.

XRateLimitReset.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the current rate-limit window resets.

TeamIdQuery.name: teamId
TeamIdQuery.description: Team scope used by run submission and run listing.

LimitQuery.name: limit
LimitQuery.description: Maximum history rows to return. The route caps this value at 200 and defaults to 50.

value.error: Invalid request: missing or invalid field(s): url

url: url must be a valid URL

value.error: Fan-out exceeds maximum (120 screenshots; limit is 100).

UnauthorizedError.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key. The auth guard returns this before rate-limit headers are set.

PaymentRequiredError.description: Plan or usage limit blocks the operation.

example.error: Monthly run limit reached (500 on the Free plan).

ForbiddenError.description: Authenticated caller lacks the required team, project, or role permission.

NotFoundError.description: Resource is missing or hidden by ownership scoping.

ConflictError.description: The requested team membership change violates role invariants.

example.error: A team must have at least one owner
Rate limit exceeded. Try again later.

text/plain.example: Service misconfigured (DB binding missing in production)

url.description: Target URL to render. The service also applies server-side render-target safety checks.
